debug_info.goal:
x T : ℝ
hx : x > exp 50
hT : T ∈ Set.Ioo (3 * log x) (√x / 3)
⊢ Eψ x ≤ (riemannZeta.zeroes_sum (Set.Ioo 0 1) (Set.Ioo (-T) T) fun ρ => ‖↑x ^ (ρ - 1) / ρ‖) + FKS.ε₁ x T

failed_attempts:
rw [ε₁]
  refine theorem_3_1 hx sorry ?_
  rcases hT with ⟨h_low, h_high⟩
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := (exp_pos 50).trans hx
  have hx_gt_1 : 1 < x := (one_lt_exp_iff.mpr (by norm_num)).trans hx
  constructor
  · calc 50 < 3 * 50 := by norm_num
      _ < 3 * log x := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left (lt_log_of_lt_exp hx) (by norm_num)
      _ < T := h_low
  · calc T < sqrt x / 3 := h_high
      _ < x / 3 := div_lt_div_of_pos_right (Real.sqrt_lt_self hx_gt_1) (by norm_num)
      _ < x := div_lt_self hx_pos (by norm_num)
